창세기 5:1.content: This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man, he made him in God’s likeness.

창세기 5:2.content: He created them male and female, and blessed them. On the day they were created, he named them Adam.

창세기 5:3.content: Adam lived one hundred thirty years, and became the father of a son in his own likeness, after his image, and named him Seth.

창세기 5:4.content: The days of Adam after he became the father of Seth were eight hundred years, and he became the father of other sons and daughters.

창세기 5:5.content: All the days that Adam lived were nine hundred thirty years, then he died.

창세기 5:6.content: Seth lived one hundred five years, then became the father of Enosh.

창세기 5:7.content: Seth lived after he became the father of Enosh eight hundred seven years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

창세기 5:8.content: All of the days of Seth were nine hundred twelve years, then he died.

창세기 5:9.content: Enosh lived ninety years, and became the father of Kenan.

창세기 5:10.content: Enosh lived after he became the father of Kenan eight hundred fifteen years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

창세기 5:11.content: All of the days of Enosh were nine hundred five years, then he died.

창세기 5:12.content: Kenan lived seventy years, then became the father of Mahalalel.

창세기 5:13.content: Kenan lived after he became the father of Mahalalel eight hundred forty years, and became the father of other sons and daughters

창세기 5:14.content: and all of the days of Kenan were nine hundred ten years, then he died.

창세기 5:15.content: Mahalalel lived sixty-five years, then became the father of Jared.

창세기 5:16.content: Mahalalel lived after he became the father of Jared eight hundred thirty years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

창세기 5:17.content: All of the days of Mahalalel were eight hundred ninety-five years, then he died.

창세기 5:18.content: Jared lived one hundred sixty-two years, then became the father of Enoch.

창세기 5:19.content: Jared lived after he became the father of Enoch eight hundred years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

창세기 5:20.content: All of the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty-two years, then he died.

창세기 5:21.content: Enoch lived sixty-five years, then became the father of Methuselah.

창세기 5:22.content: After Methuselah’s birth, Enoch walked with God for three hundred years, and became the father of more sons and daughters.

창세기 5:23.content: All the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty-five years.

창세기 5:24.content: Enoch walked with God, and he was not found, for God took him.

창세기 5:25.content: Methuselah lived one hundred eighty-seven years, then became the father of Lamech.

창세기 5:26.content: Methuselah lived after he became the father of Lamech seven hundred eighty-two years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

창세기 5:27.content: All the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty-nine years, then he died.

창세기 5:28.content: Lamech lived one hundred eighty-two years, then became the father of a son.

창세기 5:29.content: He named him Noah, saying, “This one will comfort us in our work and in the toil of our hands, caused by the ground which Yahweh has cursed.”

창세기 5:30.content: Lamech lived after he became the father of Noah five hundred ninety-five years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

창세기 5:31.content: All the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy-seven years, then he died.

창세기 5:32.content: Noah was five hundred years old, then Noah became the father of Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
